calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Advanced From Jan-25-21 To Oct-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Donner appeared by zoom for Dana Malloy (Trustee).
Andrew Roth on zoom.
Patrick Gordon on zoom.

Mr. Donner stated that Mary Mayo Attorney for David Goldfein indicated that she is not objecting to the sale. There being no objections, the sale was confirmed at $3,375,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 18, 2020. The Court grants the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. An additional bond is not required. The matter is under submission for the purpose of reviewing the order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
